name: @pryzm/building-graph
description: PRYZM — Unified Building Graph (UBG) core: the canonical relational node/edge model that PROJECTS the specialised graphs (SemanticGraph/TopologyLayer/RoomGraphService/DependencyResolver/ConstraintEngine) into one queryable surface. GRAPH.1 — pure P5-safe core only (L0 Zod schema + in-memory store + adapter interface); adapters (GRAPH.2) and the visual overlay (GRAPH.3) live elsewhere. See docs/01-strategy/PRYZM-BUILDING-GRAPH-AND-RELATIONAL-AI-FOUNDATION.md §3 + ADR-0058.

pryzm.note: Pure relational substrate. No THREE/DOM/I/O (P5). P8 spans at every mutation boundary (addNode/addEdge/clear/fromJSON).
